question_tagalog: Anong unang pumapasok sa isip mo bago ka matulog?
question_english: What first comes to mind before you sleep?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw huli kong iniisip sa gabi.
quote_english: You're my last thought at night.

question_tagalog: Kung may isang bagay kang gustong itanong sakin ng seryoso, ano yun?
question_english: If you wanted to ask me something seriously, what is it?
quote_tagalog: Wala akong itatago sayo.
quote_english: I will hide nothing from you.

question_tagalog: Naniniwala ka ba na soulmates tayo?
question_english: Do you believe we are soulmates?
quote_tagalog: Pinagtagpo talaga tayo ng tadhana.
quote_english: We were really brought together by destiny.

question_tagalog: Pano kung di tayo nagkakilala, ano kayang buhay natin ngayon?
question_english: What if we hadn't met, what would our lives be like now?
quote_tagalog: Masaya ako dahil dumating ka.
quote_english: I'm happy because you came.

question_tagalog: Anong pinaka-kinakatakutan mo tungkol sa future natin?
question_english: What are you most afraid of regarding our future?
quote_tagalog: Hawak kamay natin haharapin ang bukas.
quote_english: We'll face tomorrow holding hands.

question_tagalog: May nagawa ba ko today na na-appreciate mo ng palihim?
question_english: Did I do something today that you secretly appreciated?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng simpleng effort mo napapansin ko.
quote_english: I notice all your simple efforts.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo na-realize na gusto mong mag-stay sakin?
question_english: When did you realize you wanted to stay with me?
quote_tagalog: Dito lang ako, di ako aalis.
quote_english: I'm right here, I won't leave.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pangarap mo na gusto mong tuparin natin nang magkasama?
question_english: What dream do you want us to fulfill together?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang gusto kong kasama sa pangarap ko.
quote_english: I only want you in my dreams.

question_tagalog: Kung maikli na lang buhay natin, ano pang gusto mong gawin natin?
question_english: If our lives were short, what else would you want to do with me?
quote_tagalog: Susulitin ko bawat oras na kasama ka.
quote_english: I'll make the most of every hour with you.

question_tagalog: May nasabi ba ko noon na hanggang ngayon dala-dala mo?
question_english: Have I said something before that you still carry now?
quote_tagalog: Tinatanim ko bawat salita mo sa puso ko.
quote_english: I plant every word of yours in my heart.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinaka-nagpapasaya sayo in life aside from me?
question_english: What makes you happiest in life aside from me?
quote_tagalog: Suportado kita sa lahat ng gusto mo.
quote_english: I support you in everything you want.

question_tagalog: Anong isang bagay ang gusto mong baguhin ko sa ugali ko?
question_english: What one thing do you want me to change about my behavior?
quote_tagalog: Magbabago ako para sa ikabubuti natin.
quote_english: I will change for our betterment.

question_tagalog: Bakit mo pipiliing ako pa rin kahit mahirap minsan?
question_english: Why would you still choose me even when it's hard sometimes?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong hirap, ikaw lang ang pipiliin ko.
quote_english: No matter how hard, I'll only choose you.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ide-describe ang pagmamahal mo sakin ngayon?
question_english: How would you describe your love for me right now?
quote_tagalog: Pa-deep nang pa-deep yung pagmamahal ko sayo.
quote_english: My love for you gets deeper and deeper.

question_tagalog: Kung babalikan natin ang first year natin, anong mapapansin mo?
question_english: If we look back at our first year, what would you notice?
quote_tagalog: Mas nakilala ko at minahal ko ang totoong ikaw.
quote_english: I got to know and love the real you more.

question_tagalog: Pano mo nahahandle yung silence tuwing ganitong oras?
question_english: How do you handle the silence at this hour?
quote_tagalog: Payapa ang isip ko pag kasama kita.
quote_english: My mind is peaceful when I'm with you.

question_tagalog: Ano ang biggest insecurity mo na gusto mo kong tulungan ka?
question_english: What's your biggest insecurity you want me to help you with?
quote_tagalog: Perpekto ka sa paningin ko, promise.
quote_english: You're perfect in my eyes, promise.

question_tagalog: Anong memory natin ang pinaka-nagpapa-smile sayo before sleep?
question_english: What memory of us makes you smile most before sleep?
quote_tagalog: Marami pa tayong memories na gagawin.
quote_english: We still have a lot of memories to make.

question_tagalog: Kelan mo naramdaman na sakin mo lang nasasabi mga deepest thoughts mo?
question_english: When did you feel I'm the only one you can tell your deepest thoughts?
quote_tagalog: Safe place mo ko forever.
quote_english: I'm your safe place forever.

question_tagalog: Pag naging mag-asawa tayo, anong klaseng bahay gusto mo?
question_english: When we get married, what kind of house do you want?
quote_tagalog: Kahit saan basta ikaw ang uuwian ko.
quote_english: Anywhere as long as I come home to you.

question_tagalog: Kung hindi na pwede mag-work, pano tayo mabubuhay?
question_english: If we can't work anymore, how will we survive?
quote_tagalog: Gagawa tayo ng paraan, basta magkasama.
quote_english: We'll find a way, as long as we're together.

question_tagalog: May part ba ng past mo na gusto mo paring i-share sakin?
question_english: Is there a part of your past you still want to share with me?
quote_tagalog: Tanggap ko buong ikaw at yung past mo.
quote_english: I accept all of you and your past.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ko binabago to be a better person?
question_english: How are you changing me to be a better person?
quote_tagalog: Inspiring kang kasama sa buhay.
quote_english: You're inspiring to be with in life.

question_tagalog: Saan mo gusto i-spend ang remaining years ng buhay natin?
question_english: Where do you want to spend the remaining years of our lives?
quote_tagalog: Kasabay kitang tatanda.
quote_english: I'll grow old alongside you.

question_tagalog: Pano kung may problema ako pero ayaw ko sabihin, ano gagawin mo?
question_english: What if I have a problem but don't want to tell, what will you do?
quote_tagalog: Andito lang ako hanggang maging ready ka.
quote_english: I'm right here until you're ready.

question_tagalog: Naniniwala ka ba na love conquers all talaga?
question_english: Do you really believe love conquers all?
quote_tagalog: Love natin yung lalaban para satin.
quote_english: Our love will fight for us.

question_tagalog: Ano ang unang ituturo mo sa magiging anak natin?
question_english: What's the first thing you'll teach our future child?
quote_tagalog: Gusto kong malaman nilang swerte ako sayo.
quote_english: I want them to know how lucky I am to have you.

question_tagalog: Pano mo nakikita yung growth natin 5 years from now?
question_english: How do you see our growth 5 years from now?
quote_tagalog: Lalago tayo nang sabay.
quote_english: We will grow together.

question_tagalog: Anong pinakami-miss mo sa buhay na single ka pa?
question_english: What do you miss most about your single life?
quote_tagalog: Mas gusto ko yung buhay ko ngayon.
quote_english: I prefer my life now.

question_tagalog: Anong thought ang paminsan-minsan nagpapagising sayo sa madaling araw?
question_english: What thought sometimes wakes you up at dawn?
quote_tagalog: Ipagdadasal ko yung peace of mind mo.
quote_english: I'll pray for your peace of mind.

question_tagalog: Pag tayo na lang dalawa in the middle of nowhere, matutuwa ka ba?
question_english: If it were just us in the middle of nowhere, would you be happy?
quote_tagalog: Ang saya ng tahimik na buhay kasama ka.
quote_english: A quiet life with you is so joyful.

question_tagalog: Ano yung madalas mong isipin tungkol sakin pag nag-iisa ka?
question_english: What do you often think about me when you're alone?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang ibang laman isip ko kundi ikaw.
quote_english: My mind is filled with nothing but you.

question_tagalog: Saan ka nakakakuha ng lakas pag feeling mo down na down ka?
question_english: Where do you draw strength when you feel so down?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang lakas mo at ikaw ang sakin.
quote_english: I am your strength and you are mine.

question_tagalog: Pag iniisip mo mga regrets mo as a person, damay ba ko dun?
question_english: When you think of your regrets as a person, am I part of them?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang ang hindi ko paghihinayangan.
quote_english: You're the only one I won't regret.

question_tagalog: May mga gabi bang natatakot kang mag-isa kaya gusto mo ko kausap?
question_english: Are there nights you're scared of being alone so you want to talk to me?
quote_tagalog: Kakausapin kita hanggang makatulog ka.
quote_english: I'll talk to you until you fall asleep.

question_tagalog: Pano mo nalalampasan yung mga gabing puno ka ng self-doubt?
question_english: How do you get past nights full of self-doubt?
quote_tagalog: Sapat ka at palaging sapat para sakin.
quote_english: You are and will always be enough for me.

question_tagalog: Iniisip mo ba minsan ang purpose natin together?
question_english: Do you sometimes think about our purpose together?
quote_tagalog: Para suportahan ang isa't isa, yan purpose natin.
quote_english: To support each other, that's our purpose.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang maglalarawan sa peacefulness pag kasama ako?
question_english: What word describes the peacefulness when you're with me?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang pahinga ng puso ko.
quote_english: You are my heart's rest.

question_tagalog: Kung pwedeng isulat ang buhay natin sa libro, anong ending?
question_english: If our lives could be written in a book, what's the ending?
quote_tagalog: Tayo ang bubuo ng happy ending natin.
quote_english: We will build our happy ending.

question_tagalog: Gaano ka-klaro sayo ang future pag ako kasama mo?
question_english: How clear is the future to you when I'm with you?
quote_tagalog: Wala na kong ibang plano kundi ikaw.
quote_english: I have no other plans but you.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba na tayo na ang una at huli sa isa't isa?
question_english: Do you want us to be the first and last of each other?
quote_tagalog: Huling pag-ibig ko'y ikaw.
quote_english: My last love is you.

question_tagalog: Pag nahihirapan ang isa, pano ka nagbibigay support in a late-night talk?
question_english: When one struggles, how do you give support in a late-night talk?
quote_tagalog: Makinig muna at umunawa.
quote_english: Listen first and understand.

question_tagalog: Anong mga lesson ang natutunan mo sakin over time?
question_english: What lessons have you learned from me over time?
quote_tagalog: Natuto kong mas magmahal dahil sayo.
quote_english: I learned to love more because of you.

question_tagalog: Sino ang nagiging mas emotional satin pag dumidilim na?
question_english: Who becomes more emotional between us when it gets dark?
quote_tagalog: Ilabas mo lang yan, pakikinggan kita.
quote_english: Just let it out, I'll listen to you.

question_tagalog: Pano natin maiiwasan ang toxic traits bilang partner?
question_english: How can we avoid toxic traits as partners?
quote_tagalog: Open communication palagi gaya ngayon.
quote_english: Always open communication like today.

question_tagalog: Ano ang unang bagay na ginawa ko para maramdaman mong secured ka?
question_english: What's the first thing I did for you to feel secured?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang makakaputol sa tiwala ko sayo.
quote_english: Nothing can break my trust in you.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ko binabalanse pag magulo ang isip ko?
question_english: How do you balance me when my mind is chaotic?
quote_tagalog: Andito ko para magbigay linaw sa gulo.
quote_english: I'm here to bring clarity to the chaos.

question_tagalog: Bakit parang in the middle of the night mo lang nararamdaman gusto mo ko yakapin ng mahigpit?
question_english: Why does it seem that only in the middle of the night you feel like hugging me tightly?
quote_tagalog: Mas dama kita pag tahimik ang paligid.
quote_english: I feel you more when the surroundings are quiet.

question_tagalog: Pag tumatanda na tayo, pag-uusapan pa rin ba natin ang deep things?
question_english: When we get older, will we still talk about deep things?
quote_tagalog: Kahit matanda na tayo, hindi magbabago 'to.
quote_english: Even when we're old, this won't change.

question_tagalog: Ano yung palagi mong dinadasal para sa akin nang palihim?
question_english: What do you always secretly pray for me?
quote_tagalog: Sana lagi kang inilalayo sa pananakit.
quote_english: May you always be kept away from pain.

question_tagalog: May part ba sakin na di mo akalaing magugustuhan mo?
question_english: Is there a part of me that you never thought you'd like?
quote_tagalog: Minahal ko lahat ng flaws mo.
quote_english: I loved all your flaws.

question_tagalog: Pag dumating ba yung time na malayo tayo sa isa't isa, anong late-night talk gagawin natin?
question_english: If the time comes we're far apart, what late-night talk will we do?
quote_tagalog: Malayo man ang distansya, magkalapit puso natin.
quote_english: Distance may be far, but our hearts are close.

question_tagalog: May moments bang gusto mo ng silence na kasama ko kesa mag-usap?
question_english: Are there moments you want silence with me rather than talk?
quote_tagalog: Comfortable with silence pag ikaw.
quote_english: I'm comfortable with silence if it's you.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang gusto mong unang marinig pag gising bukas?
question_english: What word do you want to hear first upon waking up tomorrow?
quote_tagalog: Love you and good morning sabay halik.
quote_english: Love you and good morning with a kiss.

question_tagalog: Bakit gabi mo lang usually nilalabas lahat ng struggles mo?
question_english: Why is it usually at night that you pour out all your struggles?
quote_tagalog: Di mo kailangan kimkimin maghapon.
quote_english: You don't need to keep it in all day.

question_tagalog: Nakakagaan ba pag pinapaalala ko yung pag-ibig ko bago ka matulog?
question_english: Does it lighten up when I remind you of my love before you sleep?
quote_tagalog: Masarap matulog nang alam kong mahal mo ko.
quote_english: It's nice to sleep knowing you love me.

question_tagalog: Na-imagine mo ba gano kasakit pag nawala tayo sa isa't isa?
question_english: Have you imagined how painful it'll be if we lose each other?
quote_tagalog: Wag na natin isipin dahil hindi yun mangyayari.
quote_english: Let's not think about it because it won't happen.

question_tagalog: Kung pwede kitang bigyan ng super strength against emotional pain, papayag ka?
question_english: If I could give you super strength against emotional pain, would you agree?
quote_tagalog: Palaging anjan sandalan mo if masaktan ka.
quote_english: Your shoulder to lean on is always here if you get hurt.

question_tagalog: Pano kung manghina ako sa gitna ng journey natin?
question_english: What if I get weak in the middle of our journey?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang sasalo at hahatak sayo.
quote_english: I will catch and pull you up.

question_tagalog: Sigurado ka ba sakin as your lifetime partner based sa mga usapang ganito?
question_english: Are you sure of me as your lifetime partner based on talks like this?
quote_tagalog: Itong mga usapang 'to ang mas nagpatibay sakin.
quote_english: These talks are what made me more certain.
